concerns.detail: Identifies a specific student by unique combination of advisor affiliation (Yufei Ding), institution (Stanford PhD), and specific adverse events (cancelled UCB offer, PKU investigation), which constitutes lab-specific descriptors detailed enough to de-anonymize a private individual.
concerns.excerpt: Yufei Ding今年stf的phd，纯学术妲 己,考试还作弊?(点赞)被ucb取消offer

concerns.detail: Contains gendered slur '学术妲己' (academic Daji) implying moral corruption through sexual manipulation, and unsupported character judgments like '苍蝇不叮没缝的蛋' (victim-blaming aphorism), rather than criticism of concrete advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 纯学术妲 己,考试还作弊?(点赞)...苍蝇不叮没缝的蛋
